languages.text: Эти обелиски были возведены гораздо позже изначального строения. Что на них написано? Похвальба? Дань памяти? Предостережение?
These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?
languages.original_text: Эти обелиски были возведены гораздо позже изначального строения. Что на них написано? Похвальба? Дань памяти? Предостережение?

traits.locale_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?
These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?
These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

languages.text: このオベリスクは、この遺跡よりもずっと後に建てられた。碑文には、賛辞、墓碑銘、警告のどれが刻まれているのだろうか。
languages.original_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

traits.locale_text: このオベリスクは、この遺跡よりもずっと後に建てられた。碑文には、賛辞、墓碑銘、警告のどれが刻まれているのだろうか。

languages.text: Bu dikili taşlar, orijinal yapıdan çok daha sonra dikilmiş. Üzerlerinde ne yazıyor? Methiye mi? Mezar yazısı mı? Uyarı mı?
languages.original_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

traits.locale_text: Bu dikili taşlar, orijinal yapıdan çok daha sonra dikilmiş. Üzerlerinde ne yazıyor? Methiye mi? Mezar yazısı mı? Uyarı mı?

languages.text: Estos obeliscos se erigieron mucho después que la estructura original. ¿Qué será lo que tienen escrito? ¿Un panegírico? ¿Un epitafio? ¿Una advertencia?
languages.original_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

traits.locale_text: Estos obeliscos se erigieron mucho después que la estructura original. ¿Qué será lo que tienen escrito? ¿Un panegírico? ¿Un epitafio? ¿Una advertencia?

languages.text: 这些方尖碑的建立，远晚于此处最早的建筑。这上面书写的究竟是什么？颂词？墓志铭？还是警告？
languages.original_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

traits.locale_text: 这些方尖碑的建立，远晚于此处最早的建筑。这上面书写的究竟是什么？颂词？墓志铭？还是警告？

languages.text: Ces obélisques ont été érigés bien plus tard que la structure d'origine. Que signifient ces inscriptions gravées à la surface ? S'agit-il d'un panégyrique ? D'une épitaphe ? D'une mise en garde ?
languages.original_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

traits.locale_text: Ces obélisques ont été érigés bien plus tard que la structure d'origine. Que signifient ces inscriptions gravées à la surface ? S'agit-il d'un panégyrique ? D'une épitaphe ? D'une mise en garde ?

languages.text: Diese Obelisken wurden deutlich später als die ursprüngliche Struktur errichtet. Was steht auf ihnen geschrieben? Eine Lobrede? Ein Epitaph? Eine Warnung?
languages.original_text: These obelisks were erected much later than the original structure. What is written on them? A panegyric? An epitaph? A warning?

traits.locale_text: Diese Obelisken wurden deutlich später als die ursprüngliche Struktur errichtet. Was steht auf ihnen geschrieben? Eine Lobrede? Ein Epitaph? Eine Warnung?
